name: health-tests
description: Headless (jsdom) test suite for the Health apps. Loads ../<app>.html and asserts on real behavior. Not shipped to the app; lives in the repo so the suite is durable across builds.

scripts.test: node baseline.test.js && node helpers.test.js && node portion.test.js && node usda.test.js && node source.test.js && node scan.test.js && node ui.test.js && node decode.test.js && node delivery2a.test.js && node serving.test.js
